items.summary: Ensure the Home page correctly fetches and displays all publicly available scripts from the backend, showing script cards with title, description, category, author, and creation date.
Ensure the My Scripts page correctly fetches and displays all scripts belonging to the authenticated user, with working edit and delete functionality.

Audit and fix the React Query hooks in useQueries.ts to ensure the script-fetching queries are correctly wired to the backend actor and returning data. Verify that query keys, actor method calls, and data transformations are correct so scripts are not lost or silently failing.

Verify the backend main.mo actor exposes correct public read endpoints for listing all scripts and user-specific scripts, ensuring stored scripts are accessible and not inadvertently filtered out or lost.
